title: Logging to stderr preserves TUI stdout
description:
GOOD CHOICE: Logging is deliberately routed to stderr (main.rs 62: .with_writer(io::stderr)) while the ratatui TUI uses stdout.

A contributor might want to 'simplify' by unifying output streams or letting logs go to stdout for visibility. But log output to stdout would corrupt the TUI rendering — ratatui expects exclusive control of stdout.

This separation is non-obvious and easy to overlook, but it is load-bearing for TUI integrity.
close_reason: Verified invariant holds in current code; documented in DESIGN.md §14 TUI terminal safety invariants
